title: Dirt To Diamonds
description: A datapack that lets you turn dirt into diamonds!
body:
# Dirt To Diamonds
Dirt to Diamonds is a data pack that allows you to turn dirt... into diamonds.
The data pack also contains recipes for tools, armor, jukeboxes, and enchanting tables.

![Game Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6sffwJBY/images/c697f64a4c744de47a016b6a49d2b577fb741e72.png)
